topic: Competitive analysis of Servitor/Egregore vs similar tools (OpenClaw, etc.) - ease of implementation, scalability, networkability
goals: Identify similar tools to Servitor/Egregore in the market
Assess ease of implementation, scalability, networkability

The Market Scout.position: No competitor combines MCP + Rust + decentralization + attestation + gossip

The Infrastructure Analyst.position: Single-daemon appropriate for current use case, consumer groups enable scaling

The Trust Architect.position: Strongest trust guarantees in AI agent space
The Trust Architect.recommendation: Market as verifiable AI for compliance-sensitive use cases

The Challenger.position: Technical uniqueness does not equal market demand
The Challenger.recommendation: Find 3 users who would pay before celebrating uniqueness

decision: Hybrid Strategy: MCP-First with Compliance Positioning
